Positive sparse coding of natural images: a theory
for simple cell tuning
David GT Barrett1,2*, Sophie Denève1, Christian K Machens2
From Twenty Second Annual Computational Neuroscience Meeting: CNS*2013
Paris, France. 13-18 July 2013
